rationale: The Russia-Ukraine war continues at its established high baseline; the US-Iran peace deal moving toward formal signing is a continuation that sustains concern about US attention diversion — no new qualitative change for Ukraine this cycle.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues — no qualitative change
top_events.summary: Active combat and infrastructure threats persist at the established high baseline for Ukrainian residents — no new qualitative escalation or de-escalation this cycle.

top_events.title: US, Iran to sign peace deal Friday; Trump focused on Middle East
top_events.summary: The US-Iran deal moving to formal signing sustains concern that US diplomatic and military attention remains diverted from Ukraine — continuation of last cycle's concern, no new qualitative shift.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
top_events.summary: A human-interest story about Russian families using AI to simulate deceased soldiers — no direct operational or policy impact on Ukrainian daily life.
